name: Aarohi Mehta
text: My bridal makeup stayed flawless the entire day. The team was calm, professional, and knew exactly what I wanted.

name: Ritika S.
text: Best hair cut I have had in years. Detailed consultation, clean finish, and the blowout lasted three days.

name: Naina Verma
text: Super clean space, friendly staff and the facial was relaxing and effective. Booking was simple too.
